_readme: Written by the Cowork laptop task. Board reads this every 15 min. Keep newest first, max ~8 posts. 'time' is the post's UTC timestamp; the board renders GST.

posts.text:
Everything to play for with a place in the World Cup final in sight 🏆🌍

Good luck to @rayan_cherki and Rodri! 🩵

On this day, we signed three City legends:

🩵 David Silva (2010)
🩵 Raheem Sterling (2015)
🩵 Kyle Walker (2017)
Immerse yourself in the City story and book your Etihad Stadium tour today! ⬇️
Football meets purpose in New York! The Young Leaders Summit wrapped up a week of leadership, community and social impact, bringing young people together and connecting communities across the US 🩵

Tickets for all our home @premierleague fixtures will go on sale to Premium, Matchday & Junior Members on Tuesday 21 July at 10:00 (UK).

Season Ticket Members will also be able to purchase additional tickets for selected matches 🎟️

The World Cup final is fast approaching!

But which of our City stars will feature?

Lock in your semi-final predictions now! ⤵️

Only four countries remain...

Wishing our lads the best of luck in the semi-finals of the World Cup! 🏆
